chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-149 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.2042/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 3. 3. For orders on CMA No.632/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 03.02.2026. Petitioner Saqib Mehmood Khan is present in person. ------ 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. The Petitioner alleges that the Respondent No.5 is practicing without holding a requisite license issued by the PMDC. The Petitioner seeks that an action be taken in that regard by the Respondents Nos.2 and 3 and elicits directions to the said Respondents. No such directions are required, as the said Respondents ought to themselves look into the matter. Under such circumstances, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly, alongwith pending Miscellaneous Applications, leaving the Petitioner at liberty to pursue his Application before the concerned Respondent(s). JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
